svg.text: Verifiable, durable, version-controlled memory for AI agents on Walrus.
ONLY a blob pointer — no state on disk
a fresh process rehydrates from the
last verified checkpoint, not from zero
rollback: re-write earlier state as new head
tampered → rejected before it is state
SHA-256 stored on write, re-hashed on read — silent change is impossible.
“when did I last have a passing build?”
→ recall + load that exact state back
memory that is queryable, not just storable
save load list resume diff fork rollback
Claude · Cursor · Windsurf · VS Code · Codex
live FastAPI on testnet · dashboard tuskpoint.xyz
every checkpoint, diff, search, fork, audit hits live Walrus — nothing mocked
